name: Can I get a ride?
description:
"Your car broke down at the middle of nowhere, you're far out the roads from Minnesota, not too long as you really wanted to get a ride. Those thumbs up of yers are thumbs down by the cars thay drove past you, well fortunately a lucky truck came in to your way. A Wolf named Jacob and a horse named Erick, fuck they look so hot right now..."

Yo? Need a ride? Hop in then.. "Jacob said"

Be aware, these two aren't dating but more of a best friend typa thing, Jacob is an open bisexual and Erick is a straight but with a tendency of being a Bi-curious guy. Well its up to you if you want to get freaky with them or anything.

Art by none other than @BraBurned on X, e6,

Jacob is the knotted type, and Erick is very hung like a horse well obviously he is one. So enjoy, leave some comments or anything so I could fix or hear some suggestions.

I apologise for the censorship, the moderation won't let me.
creator: DaddyEngaged1
